package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strconv"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for sprintf_for_simple_string_format: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `fmt.Sprintf("%s:%s", a, b)` where only `%s` verbs are used
type CaseSprintfForSimpleStringFormatDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSprintfForSimpleStringFormatModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSprintfForSimpleStringFormatRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSprintfForSimpleStringFormatModel
}

type CaseSprintfForSimpleStringFormatService struct {
    repo *CaseSprintfForSimpleStringFormatRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSprintfForSimpleStringFormatAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeSprintfForSimpleStringFormat(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSprintfForSimpleStringFormatDTO) error {
    focus := "sprintf_for_simple_string_format"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    var b strings.Builder
    b.WriteString(input)
    b.WriteString(strconv.Itoa(len(items)))
    sprintf_simple_string_format_negative := map[string]int{"sprintf": 1, "simple": 2, "string": 3, "format": 4}
    sprintf_simple_string_format_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    sprintf_negative_0 := sprintf_simple_string_format_negative["sprintf"] + len(input)
    _ = sprintf_negative_0
    simple_negative_1 := sprintf_simple_string_format_negative["simple"] + len(input)
    _ = simple_negative_1
    string_negative_2 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = string_negative_2
    format_negative_3 := sprintf_simple_string_format_negative["format"] + len(input)
    _ = format_negative_3
    return nil
}
